mechanism: Volatile oils dominated by β-asarone (≈95%) and α-asarone modulate neurological function; β-asarone exhibits antispasmodic and sedative properties but is hepatotoxic; other terpenoids contribute to antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities【165634396553563†L445-L520】.
contraindications: β-asarone is potentially carcinogenic; avoid long-term or high-dose use; contraindicated in pregnancy and children.
